channel.title: Manuals on TATOE - Art Trail Management
channel.description: Recent content in Manuals on TATOE - Art Trail Management

item.title: Owner Guide - TATOE Art Trail Management
item.description:
Welcome to the TATOE Owner Help page!

Onwer Overview

As a TATOE Owner you will contact me for TATOE signing in. You provide me with your email address, which will be used for you to sign in, and I will send you your unique password.

1 - sign in (after selecting the “owner” button). 2 - create one or more admin users. 3 - give each a login name and password. Let them know (eg email them). You can also give them their real name. You can change these at any time.

item.title: Participant Guide - TATOE Art Trail Participation
item.description:
Welcome to the TATOE Participant Portal! This guide will help you navigate the art trail participation process, from registration to venue assignments.

Overview

The TATOE Participant Portal allows artists to join art trails, express interest in venues, and manage their participation. The system supports both venue hosting and guest participation with real-time updates.

Getting Started

First-Time Login

  1. Receive Invitation

    • Check your email for the TATOE invitation
    • Click the setup link provided
    • Create your password and complete registration

  2. Project Login
